Common.offlineBlocked: Ise use karne ke liye online jayein
Common.offlineFeatureBody: Iske liye cloud model chahiye. Ise use karne ke liye assistant se wapas online jayein.
Common.name: Naam

Login.heading: Mike aur Donna mein sign in karo
Login.subheading: Apna PIN daalo ya biometric use karo
Login.errorGeneric: Sign-in fail ho gaya. Dobara try karo.

Signup.heading: Apna Mike aur Donna account banao
Signup.subheading: Apna data safe rakhne ke liye PIN set karo
Signup.errorPinTooShort: PIN mein kam se kam 4 digit hone chahiye
Signup.errorUsernameTaken: Ye username pehle se liya hua hai
Signup.errorGeneric: Sign-up fail ho gaya. Dobara try karo.

Account.title: Account
Account.errorPinTooShort: Naya PIN kam se kam 4 digit ka hona chahiye
Account.errorPinMismatch: Naye PIN match nahi kar rahe

Personalization.heading: Mike kaise kaam kare — aap batao
Personalization.description: Mike ko batao ki aap kaise practice karte ho, drafts mein kya prefer karte ho, aapka style kya hai, citations kaisi chahiye. Mike ye sab jagah apply karega — chat, drafting, case analysis. Aise likho jaise kisi naye associate ko brief kar rahe ho.
Personalization.placeholder: Main [practice area] karta/karti hoon [city/court] mein. Mujhe [drafting style — jaise concise, formal, numbered paragraphs] pasand hai. Citations mein [Supreme Court / specific High Courts] ko priority do. Mere usual case types hain [list]. Meri practice mein common pitfalls hain [list].

Knowledge.heading: Firm Knowledge
Knowledge.description: Apni firm ki pichli yachikaein, skeleton arguments aur templates upload karo. Assistant drafting karte samay unhe search karta hai — better context generic text ko hara deta hai.
Knowledge.uploadLabel: Upload karne ke liye click karo ya files yahan drag karo
Knowledge.emptyState: Abhi tak koi firm document nahi hai — apni pehli yachika ya template upload karo ऊपर।

Models.title: LLM models
Models.subtitle: Apne LLM providers configure karo. API keys sirf locally store hoti hain.
Models.apiKeyKeepHint: Saved key rakhni hai toh khali chhodo
Models.geminiRegionHint: Generative Language API (API key auth) sirf global hai. Region future Vertex AI integration ke liye preference ke roop mein store hota hai (GCP service account chahiye). Calls abhi generativelanguage.googleapis.com pe jaati hain.

ProjectExport.title: Project export karo
ProjectExport.subtitle: Ek encrypted .mikeprj file banao jo aapka colleague apne Mike aur Donna mein import kar sake. File tabhi khulegi jab recipient neeche diye email se registered ho.
ProjectExport.includeChatsHint: Chalu karne pe is project ki chats bhi export hongi. Default mein band hai taaki private conversations share na ho.

ProjectImport.title: Project import karo
ProjectImport.subtitle: Aapke saath share ki gayi .mikeprj file yahan drop karo. Ye aapke account mein naye project ke roop mein import hogi.
ProjectImport.yourEmailHint: Ye wahi email hona chahiye jo sender ne export karte waqt recipient mein daala tha.
ProjectImport.imported: Project import ho gaya. Redirect ho raha hai…
ProjectImport.errorWrongEmail: Ye file kisi aur email ke liye encrypt ki gayi thi. Sender se bolo ki aapke email se dobara export kare.

Sync.title: Local documents
Sync.subtitle: Local folder se documents index karo (subfolders bhi) taaki chat unhe context ke roop mein use kar sake. Files ko passages mein split karke multilingual-e5-base se embed kiya jaata hai. Supported: PDF (embedded text wali), DOCX (tracked-deletion / strike-through detection ke saath), RTF, XLSX, MD, TXT. Scanned PDFs aur images skip hoti hain.
Sync.label: Label (optional)
Sync.removeConfirm: Is folder ko configuration se hatana hai? Disk pe files ko kuch nahi hoga. Embeddings Lance mein rahenge jab tak manually purge nahi karte.
Sync.noFolders: Abhi tak koi folder configure nahi hai. Shuru karne ke liye upar se ek add karo.
Sync.modelDownloading: Embedding model download ho raha hai ({file})
Sync.modelHint: Pehli baar ka download ~280 MB hai aur ek hi baar hota hai; baad ke scans offline shuru hote hain.

Mcp.title: MCP servers
Mcp.subtitle: Remote ya local MCP servers add karo taaki assistant ki capabilities badh sakein.
Mcp.name: Naam

Assistant.title: Assistant
Assistant.placeholder: Apne documents ke baare mein kuch poocho…
Assistant.slowToolHint: Is tool ko thoda time lag sakta hai (data download, files process, ya external service ka wait). Wait karo — result aayega jab ready hoga.
Assistant.noModelsAvailable: Koi model available nahi hai. Account → LLM models mein provider configure karo.
Assistant.modelLacksTools: Selected model tools support nahi karta — kuch advanced features available nahi honge.
Assistant.offlineNeedsLocal: Offline kaam karne ke liye Account → LLM mein local model set karein
Assistant.genericError: Kuch galat ho gaya. Dobara try karo.
Assistant.clarifyingQuestions: Draft se pehle ek quick check
Assistant.proceedingWithPlaceholders: Bina jawab waale points ke liye placeholders ke saath aage badh rahe hain.
Assistant.couldntSubmit: Bhej nahi paaye — dobara try karo.

EditCard.errorAccept: Accept save nahi ho paya — revert ho gaya.
EditCard.errorReject: Reject save nahi ho paya — revert ho gaya.
EditCard.alreadyResolved: Ye change resolve ho chuka hai aur ab document mein nahi hai.

WorkflowSharing.title: Sharing
WorkflowSharing.allowEditing: Share recipients ko editing allow karo

DocumentSupport.indexed: RAG search ke liye indexed: PDF (embedded text wali), DOCX, RTF, TXT, MD, CSV, XLSX/XLS/ODS.
DocumentSupport.notIndexedImages: Images (PNG/JPG/TIFF): index nahi hoti. Sirf multimodal (vision-capable) LLM ke saath use ho sakti hain.
DocumentSupport.notIndexedScannedPdf: Scanned PDFs: built-in Tesseract OCR se index hoti hain. ✓
DocumentSupport.imageBadge: image — sirf multimodal model ke saath
DocumentSupport.scannedBadge: scanned PDF — multimodal ya MCP se OCR
DocumentSupport.scannedBadgeOcr: scanned PDF — MCP se OCR active

Tabular.emptyHint: Shuru karne ke liye columns aur documents add karo.

Chat.disclaimer: AI galti kar sakta hai. Jawab legal advice nahi hain.

Projects.title: Projects
Projects.emptyHint: Chats aur tabular reviews shuru karne ke liye projects mein documents upload karo.
Projects.addColleagues: Colleagues ko email se add karo…
Projects.ownerOnlyDelete: selected projects mein se {count} delete karo — sirf project owner project delete kar sakta hai

Workflows.title: Workflows
Workflows.customHint: Apni practice ke hisaab se reusable prompts aur tabular review templates banao.
Workflows.hiddenHint: Aapne jo built-in workflows chhupaye hain woh yahan dikhenge. Kabhi bhi unhide kar sakte ho.
Workflows.allHint: Reusable prompts aur tabular review templates se document analysis automate karo.

TabularReviews.title: Tabular reviews
TabularReviews.noTemplate: Koi template nahi — scratch se shuru karo
TabularReviews.noReadyDocuments: Is project mein koi ready documents nahi
TabularReviews.emptyHint: AI se documents se data nikaalke tables mein daalo.
TabularReviews.renameAction: is tabular review ko rename karo
TabularReviews.deleteAction: is tabular review ko delete karo
TabularReviews.ownerOnlyDelete: selected reviews mein se {count} delete karo — sirf review creator review delete kar sakta hai

Documents.title: Documents
Documents.supportedFormats: Supported formats: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, MD, TXT, PNG, JPG, TIFF

apiKeyMissing.title: API key chahiye
apiKeyMissing.body: Aapne abhi tak {provider} API key nahi daali. Account settings mein jaake configure karo.

creditsExhausted.title: Message limit ho gaya
creditsExhausted.body: Aapki monthly message limit 100 messages ki ho gayi hai.
creditsExhausted.resetHint: Aapke message credits har mahine ki pehli taareekh ko automatically reset ho jaate hain.

deleteChats.title: Chats delete karo
deleteChats.successBody: Aapki chat history successfully delete ho gayi hai.
deleteChats.body: Kya aap sure ho ki selected chats delete karni hain? Ye undo nahi hoga.
deleteChats.bodyAll: Kya aap sure ho ki saari {count} chats delete karni hain? Ye permanent hai aur undo nahi hoga.

ownerOnly.title: Sirf owner ke liye
ownerOnly.body: Sirf owner ye action le sakta hai.
ownerOnly.bodyWithAction: Sirf project owner {action} kar sakta hai.

uploadVersion.title: Naya version upload karo
uploadVersion.body: {filename} ke naye version ke liye file chuno.

Errors.pageNotFoundBody: Jo page aap dhoondh rahe ho wo exist nahi karta.
Errors.unauthorized: Session expire ho gaya. Dobara sign in karo.

Cases.title: Case Prep
Cases.noCaseHint: Documents analyse karne, findings generate karne, aur briefs tayyar karne ke liye ek case banao.
Cases.deleteConfirm: "{title}" delete karein? Yeh wapas nahi hoga.
Cases.noFindings: Abhi tak koi analysis nahi hui
Cases.noFindingsHint: Documents add karo aur Run Analysis pe click karo taaki findings generate ho.
Cases.noOutputs: Abhi tak koi outputs nahi bane
Cases.noOutputsHint: Pehle analysis run karo, phir briefs, memos, ya hearing prep sheets generate karo.
Cases.noDocumentsHint: Apni library se documents add karo ya is case mein naye upload karo.
Cases.noSummary: Case summary generate karne ke liye analysis run karo.
Cases.selectDocumentsHint: Is case mein add karne ke liye apni existing document library se chuno.
Cases.redactPiiTooltip: Party names, Aadhaar, PAN, phone, email, bank accounts, addresses aur pin codes ko ________ se replace karta hai
Cases.chatPlaceholder: Is case ke baare mein poocho…
Cases.chatEmptyTitle: Is case ke baare mein sawaal poocho
Cases.chatEmptyHint: Saare attached documents context ke roop mein available hain.

IndianKanoon.title: Indian Kanoon
IndianKanoon.subtitle: Indian Kanoon API se Indian case law search karo. Results locally cache hote hain aur aapke RAG index mein embed hote hain taaki instant citation jumps ho sakein.
IndianKanoon.apiKeyHint: indiankanoon.org se free key lo. Aapki key locally store hoti hai aur kabhi share nahi hoti.
IndianKanoon.enabledHint: Chalu hone pe Mike legal research ke dauran relevant cases suggest karega.
IndianKanoon.searchPlaceholder: jaise dishonour cheque NI Act 138, anticipatory bail 438 CrPC…
IndianKanoon.noResults: Koi result nahi mila. Zyada specific legal terms try karo.
IndianKanoon.cachedEmpty: Abhi tak koi case cache nahi hua. Apni local library banane ke liye cases search aur save karo.
IndianKanoon.deleteConfirm: Is case ko local index se hatana hai?
IndianKanoon.keyMissing: Search shuru karne ke liye upar apni Indian Kanoon API key daalo.
